/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我已经244级了，马上到达250级就可以再装备一个食物
澄清一下我之前的说法，{{0}}{{1}}非常高效。{{2}}{{3}}效率较低但不算太差。没有理由使用低于火星级别的HP食物。对于MP食物，软糖在更高等级时效率降低，就像你通常预期的那样。对于酸奶，{{4}}通常效率最高，但{{5}}也不错。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: To clarify my earlier statement, {{0}}{{1}} are very efficient.{{2}}{{3}} are less efficient but not too bad. There is no reason to use below mars tier hp food. For MP food the gummies become less efficient for the higher tiers like you may normally expect. For yogurt {{4}} is usually most efficient but {{5}} is fine too.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 作为法师，你最终要用高级mp食物，但别太担心这个，因为价格值得，不会没mp
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Eventually as a mage you will have to use high tier mp food but don't worry about this too much as the price is worth not running out of mp

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 作为法师主号，我用{{0}}{{1}}{{2}}，但可能应该改用龙果的东西而不是星果
/chat_channel_types/help.o: as a mage main i use {{0}}{{1}}{{2}} but should most likely be using dragon fruit stuff instead of star fruit

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 但过一会儿我就喜欢用不同的东西了哈哈
/chat_channel_types/help.o: BUT i like using different things after a bit lol

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 通常对于市场牛战斗，你会买几乎所有东西，然后卖掉战斗掉落的战利品来资助开销。那是最有效率的。但这毕竟是个游戏，你可以按自己的方式玩。如果你想自己制作食物，那也可以。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Normally for market cow combat you would buy pretty much everything and sell the loot from combat to fund that. That is the most efficient. However this is a video game and you can play how you want. If you want to make the food yourself then you can

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 好的，谢谢
请问配饰里的专业效率和专业速度有何不同呀
效率是立即重复行动的机会
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Efficiency is chance to instantly repeat action

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 能解释下“立即重复行动的机会”谁什么意思吗
因为它们是两个不同的属性，你得考虑哪个受叠加惩罚影响更小，总的来说是速度。速度还能增强战斗，但效率不行。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Since they are two different stats you have to consider which is effected less by the stacking penalty and overall that is speed. Speed also buffs combat but efficiency does not

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 好的，谢谢大家
@youchongming 就是暴击做两次
明白啦
效率是你的下一个动作有零持续时间的几率。基本上如果你触发效率，你会立即再次执行该动作
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Efficiency is the chance that your next action has zero duration. Basically you instantly do the action again if you trigger efficiency

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 效率就是自动获得经验和奖励，基本上相当于双倍或三倍甚至更多
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Efficiency is you automatically get the exp and reward basically like double or triple or more

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 无需等待队列动作计时器
/chat_channel_types/help.o: without having to wait for queue action timer

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 游戏有3秒的动作速度限制（专业动作不能低于3秒持续时间），所以效率是加快动作的另一种方式
/chat_channel_types/help.o: The game has an action speed limit of 3s (skilling actions can't go lower than 3s duration) so efficiency is another way to speed up your actions

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 所以有了10%的效率后，有10%的几率在你完成技能的正常时间后，技能会完成两次而不是一次。这会消耗双倍的材料，但产出双倍的结果，其他效果（比如美食家）也可能触发两次。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: So with 10% efficiency, 10% of the time after you spend the normal time doing the skill, it completes twice instead of once. This uses twice the normal amount of materials, but produces twice the results, and other effects (like gourmet) can happen twice too.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @01011001 解释得很好哈哈
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @01011001 good explannation haha

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 原来如此
效率可以超过100%。如果你有110%的效率，你肯定能做两次，还有10%的几率做三次！耶！
/chat_channel_types/help.o: You can have efficiency over 100%. If you have 110% efficiency, you'll CERTAINLY do it twice and have a 10% chance to do it THREE times! Yay!

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 你只有在低级操作时才会碰到那3秒限制，比如给1级奶牛挤奶，所以通常没什么影响，但如果效率不存在，那更多操作都会卡在3秒计时器上
/chat_channel_types/help.o: You'll only ever hit that 3s limit on low level actions like milking the level 1 cow so usually it's not relevant, but if efficiency didn't exist then many more actions would bottom out on 3s timer

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我有时把它和美食家比较。美食家有几率产出双倍结果，但不需要消耗双倍原料。基本就是白送的东西。但它不算做两次技能。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: I sometimes compare it with gourmet. Gourmet has a chance to produce twice the result but WITHOUT using twice the ingredients. It's basically free stuff. But it doesn't count as doing the skill twice.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 所以如果你想要经验，效率会有帮助，因为你能做更多次。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: So if you want XP, efficiency can help because you're getting more repetitions.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 好的，努力赚钱买装备
玩107天然后拼命升级，才能像我这样勉强从早期阶段开始突破 :D
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Play 107 days and grind it all out to just start barely pushing your way out of early game like me :D

/chat_channel_types/help.m: {{0}}我在努力达到1250
应该挺简单的，每个技能30级，都是1级，你行的
/chat_channel_types/help.o: it should be easy, 30 levels on each skill that is level 1 and you got this

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 17个专业，1250总等级需要全部超过71
/chat_channel_types/help.o: 17 skills, 1250 total requires having all > 71

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 甚至73-74也行
/chat_channel_types/help.o: or even 73-74

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @watisdis 想法是给那个角色的每个技能增加30级，目前它们都是1级。这很快，因为它们是1级，而且30级会很快，因为等级这么低。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @watisdis The idea was to add 30 levels to each of that character's skills which are currently level 1. This would be fast because they are level 1, and 30 levels would be quick because it is so low.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 神龛加成能影响迷宫吗
有人能告诉我，如果把三叉戟+10升级为三叉戟（R），强化会保留还是消失？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: can someone tell me if i upgrade a trident +10 to trident (r), will the enhancement stay or disappear?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @Octau强化保留
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @Octau enhancement stays

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 精炼叶子只强化自身
/chat_channel_types/help.o: refinement leaves enhance alone

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 保留
强化最多+10么？先强化后升级好还是先升级后强化好
@theoneskydream 强化最多+20
最高是20。假设你是指升级而不是精炼的话，通常先升级更好
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Max is 20. Assuming you do mean upgrade and not refine then it's better to upgrade first usually
keep 100% or 70%?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: {@Octau}精炼保持100%
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @Octau refining keeps 100%

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 太好了！
/chat_channel_types/help.o: that's so good!

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 谢谢朋友们
/chat_channel_types/help.o: thanks friends

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 谢了，老铁
/chat_channel_types/help.o: ty，bro

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 催化剂好用吗 材料有限 怕做了浪费
催化剂挺便宜的
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Catalysts are quite cheap

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 你只需要权衡一下额外的成功几率与催化剂成本，看哪个更高
/chat_channel_types/help.o: You just need to weigh the extra success chance against the cost of the catalyst and see which is higher

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 在27级催化剂可能不值得，除非你在搞大事
/chat_channel_types/help.o: at lv 27 catalysts are probably not worth it unless your doing something big

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 你打算做什么，让你觉得像炼金术？只是为了赚钱？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: What are you trying to do that you might consider alchemy? Just making coins?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @Incinarator 应该是分解较多
速度项链和智慧项链哪个更适合生活？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: is necklace of speed or necklace of wisdom better for skilling?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 速度
速度，除非你需要经验
/chat_channel_types/help.o: speed unless you need xp

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 速度项链
/chat_channel_types/help.o: necklace of speed

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 所以如果主要还是刷等级的话，那就加智力？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: so if im just farming levels out mostly then wisdom?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 是的
/chat_channel_types/help.o: yes

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 谢谢
/chat_channel_types/help.o: thanks

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 顺便把智慧茶混合起来效果最佳哦
/chat_channel_types/help.o: also combine wisdom tea for best output btw

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我一直
/chat_channel_types/help.o: i have been

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 速度间接也给经验，所以是金币和经验的良好组合
/chat_channel_types/help.o: speed indirectly gives xp too so its a good combination of gold and xp

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我现在沉迷茶叶
/chat_channel_types/help.o: im deep into teas right now

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 在彩虹工具那里，我应该买而不是自己做吗？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: At rainbow tools, should i be buying them instead of crafting?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 买通常更便宜
/chat_channel_types/help.o: buying is usually cheaper

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 从那里开始，我觉得你应该开始决定你的专业主号。专业会为你赚钱，让你直接买装备。战斗为了装备本身需要更长时间，而且可能花很多钱。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: starting for there I think you should start deciding your skilling main. Skilling will generate money for you to just buy the gears. Combat for the item itself takes way longer and can cost a lot

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 等下，没事了
/chat_channel_types/help.o: wait nvm

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我看错了，以为你说的是装备不是工具
/chat_channel_types/help.o: i misread and thought you were referring to gear not tools

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 公会试炼中，魔力泉与会里的其他魔力泉叠加吗？还是低级的会重置高级的？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: For guild trials does mana spring stack with other mana springs? Or does a lower lvl reset a higher lvl?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 各位觉得屏蔽什么比较好
@TylerTehKilla最高等级
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @TylerTehKilla highest level

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 没有叠层
/chat_channel_types/help.o: no stack

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 谢谢
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Ty

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @TylerTehKilla 最后一次施法持续存在
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @TylerTehKilla the last casted persists

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 所以如果之后施放了一个低级的，那就会保留那个
/chat_channel_types/help.o: so if a lower level is casted after, thats the one that stays

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 哦抱歉，是的Vastaya说得对，下个补丁就改成我的了
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Oh sorry, yes Vastaya is right, next patch it is changing to mine

guild.name: Fish
guild.noticeMessage:
🎮【群公告】🐮 佛系牛牛 · 快乐游戏 🌈
👪【公会大家庭】
🎉 Fish / Biu / BiuBiu / BiuBiuBiu 这四个工会是一个大家庭，阶下囚工会：WAKAKA 📌 QQ群：856720516，微信群请联系会长加入~

🚫【群规守则】
🔞 禁止内容:1)黄赌毒/暴力等违法内容;2)广告/诈骗/恶意链接;3)谣言/虚假信息;
🤝 文明交流：尊重他人，禁止人身攻击；理性讨论，拒绝恶意贬低

📚【战略资源库】
📖 牛牛战术手册：https://feishu.cn/docx/KG9ddER6Eo2uPx...
❓ 新手FAQ：https://feishu.cn/wiki/CaMdww091ioVvBk...
🏛️ 公会专属文档：https://www.kdocs.cn/l/cmYtJcua6e3I
🔒 温馨提示：公告内容请勿外传，闷声发大财~

🎁【公会福利】
💰 新人基金：3000K（游戏规则内礼物）
🎯 750级奖励：6000K大礼包
⚔️ 强化装备优惠
🤲 游戏规则内的资源互助

🌟 【公会荣耀榜】 🏆
🧙‍♂️ 战斗榜-魔法
steam火法榜：Bestcow、Goodknight
steam水法榜：weilan、Catopia
steam自然榜：Rose、Vikala、meon、17s
老登魔法：Lapapa、|allow、 Mfleaf 、NIUB1、heartfireX、xialu
🏹 战斗榜-远程
steam远程榜：Leica、Cra、OwenGod、SumimiCupid、starhong、 Boluobao
老登射手：lieren、 SXuan
⚔️ 战斗榜-近战

🌟 【公会生活榜】 🏡

🔨 强化之神：lattete、DouShaL、luyh7

🌟 【公会黑手党】 🎭
